name: High Scholar Azuri | Block Tales
description:

-AZURI

Character appearance: Azuri wears a wizard-like robe and hat inspired by the "Astral Skies" / "Astral Isle". She holds her weapon of choice, a staff, in her left hand; it is a retextured verison of the Meteor staff, however being sliver-colored, and the eye being replaced by a gem. She also wears lapis-lazuli colored glasses. Azuri has pale gray skin and black hair.
